raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":1.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.4","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"Positioning against prior work centrally requires reframing the contribution claim and gap in relation to existing research lines.","R1.4":"The delegation is load-bearing on estimating what is novel relative to prior work and whether the claimed design-space delta is defensible.","R1.7":"Prior-work positioning centrally requires attention to literature coverage, attribution, and whether relevant scholarship is represented accurately.","RX.1":"Uncertainty must be disclosed because the artifact names broad literatures without specific citations or complete evidence of coverage.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is active because the artifact makes strong firstness and no-analog claims that could exceed what the cited prior work supports.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is active to keep the projection limited to responsibility assignment rather than executing the requested positioning work.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is active because inaccurate novelty or attribution claims could mislead readers and reviewers.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability are active because any responsibility for prior-work positioning depends on tracking claims back to named sources and artifact evidence."}}

rationale.R1.1: Positioning against prior work centrally requires reframing the contribution claim and gap in relation to existing research lines.
rationale.R1.4: The delegation is load-bearing on estimating what is novel relative to prior work and whether the claimed design-space delta is defensible.
rationale.R1.7: Prior-work positioning centrally requires attention to literature coverage, attribution, and whether relevant scholarship is represented accurately.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty must be disclosed because the artifact names broad literatures without specific citations or complete evidence of coverage.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is active because the artifact makes strong firstness and no-analog claims that could exceed what the cited prior work supports.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is active to keep the projection limited to responsibility assignment rather than executing the requested positioning work.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is active because inaccurate novelty or attribution claims could mislead readers and reviewers.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are active because any responsibility for prior-work positioning depends on tracking claims back to named sources and artifact evidence.
